questions.question: 'pilot' 的意思是'飞行员'。
questions.explanation: pilot是本单元核心职业词汇，意为飞行员。

questions.question: A worker usually works in a hospital.
questions.explanation: 工人通常在工厂(factory)工作，医生或护士在医院(hospital)工作。

questions.question: 在询问职业时，'What do he do?' 是正确的表达方式。
questions.explanation: 当主语是he时，助动词应用does，正确表达为What does he do?

questions.question: If you like sports, you can be a head teacher.
questions.explanation: 喜欢运动的人更适合作为运动员(athlete)或体育老师(PE teacher)。

questions.question: 'by bike' 意为'骑自行车'。
questions.explanation: by + 交通工具 表示通过某种方式。

questions.question: What ______ your father do?
questions.explanation: your father是第三人称单数，疑问句借用助动词does。

questions.question: He works in a post office. He is a ______.
questions.explanation: 在邮局(post office)工作的人是邮递员(postman)。

questions.question: My aunt works ______ a university.
questions.explanation: 在大学工作固定搭配为work at a university。

questions.question: A ______ helps sick people.
questions.explanation: 医生(doctor)负责救治病人。

questions.question: — ______ does he work? — He works in a gym.
questions.explanation: 对地点提问用疑问词Where。

questions.question: My mother is a ______ . She can sing many songs.
questions.explanation: 会唱歌(sing)的是歌手(singer)。

questions.question: She ______ to work by bus.
questions.explanation: 主语为She，一般现在时谓语动词用三单形式goes。

questions.question: If you like drawing, you can be an ______.
questions.explanation: 喜欢绘画(drawing)可以成为艺术家(artist)。

questions.question: — ______ does she go to work? — By car.
questions.explanation: 对交通方式提问用疑问词How。

questions.question: I want to be a ______ because I like science.
questions.explanation: 喜欢科学(science)对应的理想职业是科学家(scientist)。

questions.question: A person who flies a plane is a ______.
questions.explanation: 驾飞机的人是飞行员。

questions.question: Sarah ______ (study) very hard.
questions.explanation: 三单形式变化规律，y结尾变i加es。

questions.question: My father is a teacher. He works in a ______.
questions.explanation: 教师的工作地点在学校。

questions.question: I go to work ______ foot.
questions.explanation: 步行用固定搭配on foot。

questions.question: 将下列英文职业/动作与中文意思匹配。
questions.explanation: A.businessman-商人; B.factory worker-工厂工人; C.stay healthy-保持健康; D.sea-大海。

questions.question: 将下列短语与其意思匹配。
questions.explanation: A.be good at-擅长; B.police officer-警察; C.head teacher-校长; D.post office-邮局。

questions.question: 连词成句：does, he, What, do, ?
questions.explanation: 这是询问他人的职业的标准句型。

questions.question: 'coach' 这个词的意思是'主教练'。
questions.explanation: coach在体育语境下意为教练。

questions.question: We should say 'a artist' instead of 'an artist'.
questions.explanation: artist以元音音素开头，应用an。

questions.question: A fisherman works in a factory.
questions.explanation: 渔民(fisherman)通常在海上工作。

questions.question: 'What is your job?' 与 'What do you do?' 意思相近。
questions.explanation: 两者均用于询问职业。

questions.question: If you are good at writing, you can be a reporter.
questions.explanation: 记者(reporter)需要良好的写作能力。

questions.question: My uncle is a ______.
questions.explanation: 其他选项存在拼写错误。

questions.question: How ______ your mother go to work?
questions.explanation: your mother为三单，疑问句使用does。

questions.question: My aunt works at a ______. She is a scientist.
questions.explanation: 科学家通常在大学(university)或实验室工作。

questions.question: If you like swimming, you can be a ______.
questions.explanation: 逻辑关联，游泳和渔民都与水相关。

questions.question: My uncle works on a boat. ______ is a fisherman.
questions.explanation: uncle是男性，用He代指。

questions.question: — Where does he work? — ______
questions.explanation: Where问地点，回答应包含地点。

questions.question: He often ______ storybooks after school.
questions.explanation: He是第三人称单数，动词加s。

questions.question: Which of these is NOT a job?
questions.explanation: university是地点词（大学），其他是职业。

questions.question: Oliver ______ going to be a businessman.
questions.explanation: be going to结构，Oliver用is。

questions.question: I want to be a pilot. I should ______ every day.
questions.explanation: 职业理想需要努力学习(study hard)实现。

questions.question: Mr. Li is ______ artist.
questions.explanation: 名词artist首字母a发元音，故用an。

questions.question: He works in a gym. He is a ______.
questions.explanation: 在体育馆工作的教练是coach。

questions.question: What does your father ______ (do)?
questions.explanation: 助动词does后面跟动词原形。

questions.question: He goes to school ______ bus.
questions.explanation: by + bus 表示乘坐公交。

questions.question: 英汉连线。
questions.explanation: A.reporter-记者; B.fisherman-渔民; C.university-大学; D.gym-体育馆。

questions.question: 短语匹配。
questions.explanation: A.work hard-努力工作; B.go to sea-出海; C.write stories-写故事; D.study science-研究科学。

questions.question: 词语排序：work, does, Where, she, ?
questions.explanation: Where开头的特殊疑问句，询问地点。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 掌握10个以上核心职业名词的拼写与含义
knowledge_summary.key_formula: scientist, pilot, coach, fisherman, businessman, reporter, worker
knowledge_summary.tips: 可以通过词根记忆，如work+er=worker, report+er=reporter。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 询问他人的职业、地点和交通方式
knowledge_summary.key_formula: What/Where/How + does + he/she/it + 动词原形?
common_mistakes: 在does后面错误地使用了动词的三单形式
knowledge_summary.tips: 口诀：一旦借了does，后面动词还原形。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 建立性格/爱好与理想职业之间的条件联系
knowledge_summary.key_formula: If you like..., you can be a/an...
knowledge_summary.tips: 注意职业词汇前面的冠词：a doctor, an artist。
